description: XSUAA security configuration for Joule MCP Research Server

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.ResearchViewer
scopes.description: Read-only access to basic research resources

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.ResearchUser
scopes.description: Execute MCP research tools (perplexity_sonar_answer, sap_focused_sonar_search, research_with_guardrails)

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.ResearchAdmin
scopes.description: Access to administrative logs and statistics

role-templates.name: ResearchViewer
role-templates.description: Basic viewer - access to health and status endpoints

role-templates.name: ResearchUser
role-templates.description: Can execute all MCP research tools

role-templates.name: ResearchAdmin
role-templates.description: Full access including admin logs and statistics

role-collections.name: Joule_MCP_Research_User
role-collections.description: Assign to users who need to use MCP research tools via Joule

role-collections.name: Joule_MCP_Research_Admin
role-collections.description: Assign to administrators who need access to research logs
